title: Refugist's Additions
description: A Minecraft 1.20.4 Polymer mod which add some content for an authors' personal SMP.
body:
Refugist's Additions is a Minecraft 1.20.4 [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)-based mod which add some content for an authors' personal SMP. Right now it only adds coke coal, but as the time goes it will be updated to include more content!

The mod was published only so that other people could use it and use it, so don't expect anything really cool, but I'll try.
